---
title: "New year"
author: "Guozheng Huang"
date: "2024-01-01"
categorise: ["Daily"]
toc: true
image: "image.jpg"
---

---

Hello, 2024.

"Daily" category is prepared for everyday consists of you which could belong to me.

I have written a simple introduce about the ceremony to invite gods in Xibu this morning. The context in it encouraged Fantuan and Zhuang. We went to Grandpa Feizhen's home, and talkedd to him this afternoon.

I spent the whole day on my field.

I have tried to read *《宗教的本质》* tonight, while I felt really asleep.

Fight on, I would continue writing down the video I typed with Grandpa Feizhen tomorrow.
